children.heading: No decisions by Federal reserve bank presidents
children.label: 1 No decisions by Federal reserve bank presidents
children.text: No provision of subchapter I relating to the authority of the Board of Governors shall be construed as conferring any decision-making authority on presidents of Federal reserve banks.

children.heading: Voting decisions by Board
children.label: 2 Voting decisions by Board
children.text: The Board of Governors shall not delegate the authority to make any voting decision that the Board of Governors is authorized or required to make under subchapter I of this chapter in contravention of .section 248(k) of this title
